title: JustAVaultUnlockKey
description: Utilizing Repeatable Trial Vaults, this mod adds a dedicated key to unlock Trial Vaults which is crafted from regular keys.
body: This mod simply adds a key (texture by Milkev) which is used to unlock trial vaults so you can obtain their loot again. You can easily craft this key 1:1 from a regular trial key, and 1:4 from an ominous key. The recipe is also easily changable with datapacks if you wish to modify the recipe yourself!
